title: A Guide to Startup Compensation | Kruze Consulting
note: General (non-support-specific) seed-stage engineer benchmarks: entry $75K-$105K SF, mid $100K-$145K SF / $90K-$130K other hubs, senior $180K-$235K SF / $160K-$210K other. Used only as a weak sanity check, not as a support-role anchor - too broad to raise confidence.
